mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO risk_decision_log( decision_id, event_id, user_id, action_type, scenario, result, reason_code, request_hash, signals_json, actions_json, ext_json, trace_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES( #{decisionId}, #{eventId}, #{userId}, #{actionType}, #{scenario}, #{result}, #{reasonCode}, #{requestHash}, #{signalsJson}, #{actionsJson}, #{extJson}, #{traceId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT decision_id, event_id, user_id, action_type, scenario, result, reason_code, request_hash, signals_json, actions_json, ext_json, trace_id, create_time, update_time FROM risk_decision_log WHERE decision_id = #{decisionId}

SELECT decision_id, event_id, user_id, action_type, scenario, result, reason_code, request_hash, signals_json, actions_json, ext_json, trace_id, create_time, update_time FROM risk_decision_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND event_id = #{eventId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE risk_decision_log SET result = #{result}, reason_code = #{reasonCode}, signals_json = #{signalsJson}, actions_json = #{actionsJson}, ext_json = #{extJson}, update_time = NOW() WHERE decision_id = #{decisionId}
mapper.select: SELECT decision_id, event_id, user_id, action_type, scenario, result, reason_code, request_hash, signals_json, actions_json, ext_json, trace_id, create_time, update_time FROM risk_decision_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, decision_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
